mapper.select: SELECT inventory_id, film_id, store_id, last_update FROM inventory ORDER BY inventory_id
SELECT inventory_id, film_id, store_id, last_update FROM inventory WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY film_id
SELECT inventory_id, film_id, store_id, last_update FROM inventory WHERE film_id = #{filmId} ORDER BY store_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (film_id, store_id, last_update) VALUES (#{filmId}, #{storeId}, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now())) RETURNING inventory_id
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET film_id = #{filmId}, store_id = #{storeId}, last_update = now() WHERE inventory_id = #{inventoryId}
